name: Grilled Eggplant"scapece
recipeIngredient: 8 small perfect Japanese eggplants (3 to 4 inches long)
1 teaspoon dried orange zest of 1 medium orange
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat broiler or light grill.
2. Slice eggplants in half lengthwise and brush with olive oil.
3. Grill eggplant on hot part of barbecue until deep brown, then place in an earthenware bowl.
4. In a separate bowl, stir together vinegar, garlic, mint, dried orange zest, and extra virgin olive oil.
5. Pour the liquid over the eggplant and add fresh pepper.
6. Allow to sit if you can and serve with a salad of bitter lettuce, such as chicory or radicchio.
Yield: 4 antipasto or 8 side dish servings
